requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (NS/IEC 60598-1) under ASN / Ministry of Trade Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（NS/IEC 60598-1）依据 ASN／贸易部符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（NS/IEC 60598-1）依據 ASN／貿易部符合性

summary.en: LED luminaires entering Senegal are expected to meet the general luminaire safety requirements of IEC 60598-1, adopted nationally by ASN （Association Senegalaise de Normalisation） as the NS/IEC 60598-1 reference. Senegal does not operate an EU-style CE self-declaration regime; instead, regulated imports are typically subject to the Ministry of Trade conformity / pre-export verification of conformity （PEC/VoC） process, with conformity demonstrated against the adopted IEC/NS standard. Equipment must be rated and marked for the Senegalese grid of 230 V, 50 Hz. Safety scope covers protection against electric shock （creepage, clearance, insulation resistance, touch current）, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Documentation must be in French and an in-country importer of record is normally required for customs clearance through the port of Dakar.
summary.zh: 进入塞内加尔的 LED 灯具应满足 IEC 60598-1 的通用灯具安全要求，该标准由塞内加尔标准化协会（ASN）作为 NS/IEC 60598-1 在国内采用。塞内加尔不实施欧盟式 CE 自我声明制度；受管制进口通常须经贸易部符合性／出口前符合性验证（PEC/VoC）流程，并对照所采用的 IEC/NS 标准证明符合性。设备须按塞内加尔电网 230 V、50 Hz 进行额定和标识。安全范围涵盖防触电（爬电距离、电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子。文件须为法语，清关（经达喀尔港）通常须有在地进口记录人。
summary.zht: 進入塞內加爾的 LED 燈具應滿足 IEC 60598-1 的通用燈具安全要求，該標準由塞內加爾標準化協會（ASN）作為 NS/IEC 60598-1 在國內採用。塞內加爾不實施歐盟式 CE 自我聲明制度；受管制進口通常須經貿易部符合性／出口前符合性驗證（PEC/VoC）流程，並對照所採用的 IEC/NS 標準證明符合性。設備須按塞內加爾電網 230 V、50 Hz 進行額定和標識。安全範圍涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離、電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子。文件須為法語，清關（經達喀爾港）通常須有在地進口記錄人。

standards_or_laws: NS/IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (IEC 60598-1 as adopted by ASN)
Ministry of Trade pre-export verification of conformity (PEC/VoC) pathway for regulated imports (verify current scope)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 （Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests）, replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, both based on IEC 60598-1. CCC （China Compulsory Certification） applies to in-scope residential luminaires under the applicable CNCA rules, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. The Chinese grid is 220 V / 50 Hz （single-phase）, 380 V three-phase. CCC certification and GB/T 7000.1 evidence are not automatically accepted in Senegal's conformity verification.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，二者均以 IEC 60598-1 为基础。CCC（中国强制性产品认证）依据适用的 CNCA 规则适用于范围内的居民灯具，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国电网为 220 V / 50 Hz（单相）、380 V 三相。CCC 认证及 GB/T 7000.1 证据不自动被塞内加尔符合性验证接受。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，二者均以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎。CCC（中國強制性產品認證）依據適用的 CNCA 規則適用於範圍內的居民燈具，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國電網為 220 V / 50 Hz（單相）、380 V 三相。CCC 認證及 GB/T 7000.1 證據不自動被塞內加爾符合性驗證接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both markets ultimately rest on the IEC 60598-1 technical base, so the core safety engineering is broadly shared. The differences are in conformity route and country-specific details: （1） Senegal uses a Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC verification model rather than EU-style self-declaration or China's domestic CCC — a Chinese CCC certificate does not by itself clear Senegalese conformity; （2） the nominal voltage differs （Senegal 230 V vs China 220/380 V; both 50 Hz）, so ratings, markings, and the rated-voltage tests must suit 230 V; （3） documentation must be in French and routed through an in-country importer; （4） test reports should be from an ILAC-recognised laboratory to be accepted in the PEC/VoC process — confirm the accepted laboratory and report format with ASN and the importer. Verify the exact list of regulated products and current PEC/VoC scope before shipment.
gap.zh: 两个市场最终均以 IEC 60598-1 技术基础为依托，故核心安全工程基本一致。差异在于合规路径及国别细节：（1）塞内加尔采用贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 验证模式，而非欧盟式自我声明或中国国内 CCC——中国 CCC 证书本身不能通过塞内加尔符合性；（2）标称电压不同（塞内加尔 230 V，中国 220/380 V；均为 50 Hz），故额定值、标识及额定电压试验须适配 230 V；（3）文件须为法语并经由在地进口商办理；（4）检测报告宜来自 ILAC 认可实验室方能在 PEC/VoC 流程中被接受——请与 ASN 及进口商确认受认可的实验室及报告格式。出货前请核实受管制产品清单及现行 PEC/VoC 范围。
gap.zht: 兩個市場最終均以 IEC 60598-1 技術基礎為依託，故核心安全工程基本一致。差異在於合規路徑及國別細節：（1）塞內加爾採用貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 驗證模式，而非歐盟式自我聲明或中國國內 CCC——中國 CCC 證書本身不能通過塞內加爾符合性；（2）標稱電壓不同（塞內加爾 230 V，中國 220/380 V；均為 50 Hz），故額定值、標識及額定電壓試驗須適配 230 V；（3）文件須為法語並經由在地進口商辦理；（4）檢測報告宜來自 ILAC 認可實驗室方能在 PEC/VoC 流程中被接受——請與 ASN 及進口商確認受認可的實驗室及報告格式。出貨前請核實受管制產品清單及現行 PEC/VoC 範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity-verification dependent — luminaire safety to NS/IEC 60598-1 expected; regulated imports subject to Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC verification (confirm current scope with ASN and importer)
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; general luminaire safety standard GB/T 7000.1-2023 (IEC 60598-1 base)

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — base standard IEC 60598-1 as adopted by ASN (NS reference to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires for Senegal should be built and tested to IEC 60598-1 as adopted by ASN （NS/IEC 60598-1） and cleared through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC route applicable to regulated imports — not the EU CE self-declaration model. Chinese CCC and GB/T 7000.1-2023 evidence do not automatically satisfy Senegalese conformity verification. Rate and mark for 230 V / 50 Hz, prepare French-language documentation, use an in-country importer, and confirm the current regulated-product list, accepted laboratory, and PEC/VoC scope with ASN before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向塞内加尔的 LED 灯具应按 ASN 采用的 IEC 60598-1（NS/IEC 60598-1）设计和检测，并经适用于受管制进口的贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 路径清关——而非欧盟 CE 自我声明模式。中国 CCC 及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 证据不自动满足塞内加尔符合性验证。按 230 V / 50 Hz 额定和标识，准备法语文件，使用在地进口商，并在出货前与 ASN 确认现行受管制产品清单、受认可实验室及 PEC/VoC 范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向塞內加爾的 LED 燈具應按 ASN 採用的 IEC 60598-1（NS/IEC 60598-1）設計和檢測，並經適用於受管制進口的貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 路徑清關——而非歐盟 CE 自我聲明模式。中國 CCC 及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 證據不自動滿足塞內加爾符合性驗證。按 230 V / 50 Hz 額定和標識，準備法語文件，使用在地進口商，並在出貨前與 ASN 確認現行受管制產品清單、受認可實驗室及 PEC/VoC 範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Safety (NS/IEC 62560) + LED Control Gear (IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（NS/IEC 62560）+ LED 控制装置（IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（NS/IEC 62560）+ LED 控制裝置（IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps （integrated LED bulbs） for the Senegalese market are expected to comply with IEC 62560 （Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications）, adopted by ASN as the NS reference, while separate LED drivers/control gear follow IEC 61347-2-13. These are the IEC product-safety bases for lamps and drivers respectively. As with luminaires, conformity is demonstrated against the adopted IEC/NS standard and, for regulated imports, verified through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC process. Lamps and drivers must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz, marked accordingly, and accompanied by French-language documentation; a standalone driver sold separately carries its own conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 面向塞内加尔市场的自镇流 LED 灯（一体化 LED 灯泡）应符合 IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），由 ASN 作为 NS 标准采用；独立 LED 驱动器／控制装置则遵循 IEC 61347-2-13。这分别是灯和驱动器的 IEC 产品安全基础。与灯具相同，符合性须对照所采用的 IEC/NS 标准证明，受管制进口须经贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程验证。灯和驱动器须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定并相应标识，并附法语文件；独立销售的驱动器须具备自身的符合性证据。
summary.zht: 面向塞內加爾市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（一體化 LED 燈泡）應符合 IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），由 ASN 作為 NS 標準採用；獨立 LED 驅動器／控制裝置則遵循 IEC 61347-2-13。這分別是燈和驅動器的 IEC 產品安全基礎。與燈具相同，符合性須對照所採用的 IEC/NS 標準證明，受管制進口須經貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程驗證。燈和驅動器須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定並相應標識，並附法語文件；獨立銷售的驅動器須具備自身的符合性證據。

standards_or_laws: NS/IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (IEC 62560 as adopted by ASN)
IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906-2010 / the GB 24906 series （safety of self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting, > 50 V, IEC 62560 base） for lamps and GB 19510.14-2014 （control gear for LED modules, IEC 61347-2-13 base） for drivers. CCC may apply to certain self-ballasted LED lamps and to LED drivers in specific power ranges under CNCA rules, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Chinese CCC reports under these GB standards are not automatically accepted in Senegal's conformity verification.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为灯方面的 GB 24906-2010／GB 24906 系列（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯安全，> 50 V，IEC 62560 基础），及驱动器方面的 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模块控制装置，IEC 61347-2-13 基础）。依据 CNCA 规则，CCC 可能适用于某些自镇流 LED 灯及特定功率范围的 LED 驱动器，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。这些 GB 标准下的中国 CCC 报告不自动被塞内加尔符合性验证接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為燈方面的 GB 24906-2010／GB 24906 系列（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈安全，> 50 V，IEC 62560 基礎），及驅動器方面的 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模組控制裝置，IEC 61347-2-13 基礎）。依據 CNCA 規則，CCC 可能適用於某些自鎮流 LED 燈及特定功率範圍的 LED 驅動器，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。這些 GB 標準下的中國 CCC 報告不自動被塞內加爾符合性驗證接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements (IEC 62560 base)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules (IEC 61347-2-13 base)

gap.en: The lamp and driver safety content is largely harmonized because both markets derive from IEC 62560 and IEC 61347-2-13. The practical gaps mirror the luminaire row: （1） Senegal verifies conformity through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route against NS/IEC adoptions, not via Chinese CCC — re-presentation of evidence to the Senegalese pathway is required; （2） voltage rating must suit 230 V （50 Hz） rather than China's 220 V; （3） French documentation and an in-country importer are needed; （4） if a driver is sold as a standalone product, it carries its own conformity evidence; （5） test reports should come from an ILAC-recognised laboratory accepted by the PEC/VoC programme. Confirm whether self-ballasted lamps and drivers fall within the regulated-import list and current PEC/VoC scope with ASN and the importer.
gap.zh: 灯和驱动器的安全内容基本协调，因两个市场均源自 IEC 62560 和 IEC 61347-2-13。实务差距与灯具行相同：（1）塞内加尔通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径对照 NS/IEC 采用标准验证符合性，而非中国 CCC——须按塞内加尔路径重新提交证据；（2）电压额定须适配 230 V（50 Hz）而非中国 220 V；（3）须法语文件及在地进口商；（4）若驱动器作为独立产品销售，须具备自身符合性证据；（5）检测报告宜来自 PEC/VoC 计划接受的 ILAC 认可实验室。请与 ASN 及进口商确认自镇流灯和驱动器是否在受管制进口清单及现行 PEC/VoC 范围内。
gap.zht: 燈和驅動器的安全內容基本協調，因兩個市場均源自 IEC 62560 和 IEC 61347-2-13。實務差距與燈具行相同：（1）塞內加爾通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑對照 NS/IEC 採用標準驗證符合性，而非中國 CCC——須按塞內加爾路徑重新提交證據；（2）電壓額定須適配 230 V（50 Hz）而非中國 220 V；（3）須法語文件及在地進口商；（4）若驅動器作為獨立產品銷售，須具備自身符合性證據；（5）檢測報告宜來自 PEC/VoC 計劃接受的 ILAC 認可實驗室。請與 ASN 及進口商確認自鎮流燈和驅動器是否在受管制進口清單及現行 PEC/VoC 範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity-verification dependent — lamp safety to NS/IEC 62560 and driver safety to IEC 61347-2-13 expected; regulated imports subject to Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC verification (confirm scope)
mandatory_status.cn: CCC may apply (product/power-range dependent) — GB 24906 (lamps) and GB 19510.14 (drivers) under CNCA rules

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — base standards IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 as adopted by ASN (NS reference to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Senegal should meet IEC 62560 as adopted by ASN （NS/IEC 62560） and standalone LED drivers should meet IEC 61347-2-13, with conformity for regulated imports verified through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route. Chinese GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 CCC evidence does not automatically satisfy Senegalese verification. Rate for 230 V / 50 Hz, provide French documentation, use an in-country importer, and confirm whether lamps and drivers are within the current regulated-import list with ASN before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向塞内加尔的自镇流 LED 灯应符合 ASN 采用的 IEC 62560（NS/IEC 62560），独立 LED 驱动器应符合 IEC 61347-2-13，受管制进口的符合性须经贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径验证。中国 GB 24906／GB 19510.14 CCC 证据不自动满足塞内加尔验证。按 230 V / 50 Hz 额定，提供法语文件，使用在地进口商，并在出货前与 ASN 确认灯和驱动器是否在现行受管制进口清单内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向塞內加爾的自鎮流 LED 燈應符合 ASN 採用的 IEC 62560（NS/IEC 62560），獨立 LED 驅動器應符合 IEC 61347-2-13，受管制進口的符合性須經貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑驗證。中國 GB 24906／GB 19510.14 CCC 證據不自動滿足塞內加爾驗證。按 230 V / 50 Hz 額定，提供法語文件，使用在地進口商，並在出貨前與 ASN 確認燈和驅動器是否在現行受管制進口清單內。
